feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Copy control is missing AF. Message -VL473
entry.content:
Hi Team,While doing QT order for delivery we are getting below error:

Copying control is missing AF.

Copying control is missing for: AF

Message No. VL473



Not Sure how to fix.Pls support us

entry.title: SAP ECC 6 EHP7 change of Customer name update in past orders and invoices
entry.content:
Description: I have a scenario that user create a new sales order by copy from a reference document. Follow by
changing customer name in the sales orders, this action update all customer name with same customer code in past sales orders and invoices that is having the same customer code.
This customer code is generic customer code use for case sales scenarios.

entry.title: SAPAATP supply protection system should not calculates the committed qty based on future time bucket
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me to clear regarding AATP supply protection functionality. Available stock 90, I have Allocated 40qty for Customer-1 (current week), 40qty for Customer 1 (future week), 30 qty for customer-2 (Current week), 30 qty for customer-2 (Future week).

If Customer-2 Low priority place an order (Current week) with 30qty system is committed only 10qty, (Avl stock 90-80(Allocated stock customer-1)=10).

System should not be considered future allocated qty of customer-1, where can be restricted?

Could you please help me.

    20/1/202527/1/2025
  Priority Protected qtyAllocated qty Allocated qty 
Order 2ndCustomer 1High804040
Order 1stCustomer 2Low603030
  Req qty Committed qty 
1Customer 13010
2Customer 28080

Thanks

entry.title: Error VPK1310 in DP93 - Intercompany Resource Related Billing Process
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have been getting the error VPK1310 "No Expenditure Items Found". A WBS Element which is a billing element is assigned to the sales order. The WBS Element have the costs in CJI3N, which is also defined in Material Determination section of the DIP Profile and we use "Intercompany - Line items" as the source. We are using pricing procedure PSER02 and condition type EK01.

Could you please guide?

entry.title: Regarding Outbound Delivery PL Attachment to FO/FB
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a business requirement that involves attaching the outbound delivery PL to the corresponding FO/FB.

  1. Is it possible to achieve this integration using Document Management System (DMS)? Kindly provide insights on how this can be implemented.

  2. Are there any alternative approaches to address this requirement? We would appreciate it if you could provide further details.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: sales process in pharma
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any source of information from SAP for sales process in pharma industry, could be best practices to check or leaning journey?

Thank you!

entry.title: Order block issue
entry.content: In ECC respective order types orders are getting blocked over and over again even though its been released from credit perspective. There is a background job that is being ran by the system it might be related to the risk category that is set for the customer how to resolved the issue

entry.title: Transaction VL10G - quantity of pallets - items with reason for rejection
entry.content:
We use VL10G to book our orders with our hauliers.

However for example when an order consists of 10 pallets but 2 lines have a reason for rejection in the order. And these 2 lines had together 3 pallets, we actually only have 7 pallets to transport. Only 7 pallets will come in the outbound delivery.

Is there any way we can make sure that calculation of pallets in VL10G takes into account the orderlines that have a reason for rejection ?

And maybe also takes into account items that are not available. Currently these items are also in VL10G and will not be available, thus not in the delivery, thus should not be transported.

Thanks

entry.title: Reversal of goods issue in case of invoice created
entry.content:
Hi,

in S/4 if I do a goods issue (Without using any WM) on an outbound delivery and invoice has been created.

Can I do a reversal of goods issue? 

I need to understand, in what cases I can do a reversal of goods issue and in which case not.

If I cannot do a reversal of goods issue, what is the standard process of doing that, for example I need to run returns process?

entry.title: IDOC ORDCHG - Schedule Line dates not updated
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

i have a problem with incoming IDOC ORDCHG. 

In the actual sales order, the availability determines all the schedule line dates, for example Delivery date = 01.03.2025

In field E1EDP20-EDATU i passed a new date to the sales order (01.04.2025). The IDOC is processed correctly and VBEP-EDATU is changed, but all the other schedule line dates are not updated (TranspPlngDate; Mat.Avail.Date; Loading Date; Goods Issue). They remain with the same value, even if the should be updated based on the new delivery date. 

If i perform this change manually it works, but if i performed it via interface, it does not work. 

Someone can help me? 

Thanks

S.

entry.title: Add an accounting document to an SD sales flow
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like some help, we need to make an accounting entry referring to a document billed by SD, but it will be a manual entry, I would like to know if there is the possibility of adding this entry to the SD flow, in VF...
Is there a more Standard way possible, and if it's just Z, how would I do it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PT BR

Ola!

Gostaria de uma ajuda, precisamos fazer um lançamento contábil referente a um documento faturado por SD, mas será um lançamente manual, gostaria de saber se existe a possibilidade de adicionar esse lançamento no fluxo de SD, na VF...
Existe algum modo mais Standard possível, e se for somente Z, como eu faria?

entry.title: Change o mode of transport in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using S4HANA with a 3rd party Warehouse management system with embedded TM.

My question is that if we change the mode of transport in outbound delivery before loading, will we need to change the same in sales order via an interface?

from business point of view, the case is very normal for example a warehouse worker can decide if the material is big so we need to change from road to train for example.

entry.title: Sales Order is blocked, even although credit limit is not exceeded.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In FD32, Credit limit is 1000. Sales Order is 852. Open items in T.code OVA8 is 90%.

 But the Sales order is blocked giving the message - Order blocked for delivery as a result of credit check.  Refer to the screenshot also. Please suggest. we are in ECC 6.0

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Payment term description
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Payment terms description is showing in german language in tax invoice print however in billing document header its showing in english. 

i have checked table tvzbt in that table payment terms in maintained in both languages german and english. 

Also i not able to see the print preview of the billing document.

entry.title: When is LIKP-TCODE populated with VL10X
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need to know when the field LIKP-TCODE for Outbound Deliveries (e.g. LF) is populated with "VL10X" instead of "VL01N".

I made some tests and seems to be related to a massive delivery creation, when multiple sales orders are included in the same delivery (using for instance t.code VL10C): is my understanding correct?

Do you know which Fiori APP are used to store value VL10X in LIKP-TCODE?

Thank you in advance,

Sonia.

entry.title: Invoice before doing a good issue in S4
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using S4HANA 2024, in our scope we have an integration with 3rd party warehouse.

My question is , how we can do invoicing before doing a goods issue. 

Is there any standard functionality in S4 which we can use?

As we need to do invoicing after loading in the warehouse , just for the custom clearance.

entry.title: Sales order with reference to contract, equal quantity.
entry.content:
Dear, 

I have a scenario where a contract with a quantity of 1,000 was created.

I am currently able to create a sales order with reference to the 1,100 contract, for example.

How can I lock this amount via configuration?

I need to allow order creation with reference only up to the contract quantity in this example quantity of 1,000.

Thanks.

entry.title: CDS View for 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working with SAP Datasphere loading data from S4 and I need to replace the old 2LIS* datasources with the new CDS view. Anyone knows how can I replace 2LIS_11_V_SSL and 2LIS_12_VCSCL?

Thanks,

Sam

entry.title: Cancellation document pending – Cannot release via VFX3
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing an issue with a cancellation document that remains pending and has not generated the expected accounting documents.

Situation:

A billing document was canceled using VF11.
The original invoice belongs to a closed posting period (November), and the cancellation was attempted in December.
The cancellation document remains pending and did not generate the expected accounting entries.

What I tried:

I attempted to release the document using VFX3, but this requires modifying OB52 to reopen the posting period, which is not an option in this case.

Considered Option:

I am evaluating the possibility of canceling the S1 document using an S2 document.
However, I need more details regarding the copy control settings for this process, as I do not have access to SAP Note 388489.

Questions:

Is it viable to cancel S1 with S2 in this scenario?
Could someone provide details about the copy control settings for this process?
Are there alternative solutions to process the cancellation without modifying OB52?


I appreciate any suggestions or experiences you can share.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business volume
entry.content:
Hi All, 

in the Sales rebates scenario in S/4 Hana we configured different types of sales rebates condition contract types with different types of settlement documents (credit note, debit note etc).

The requirement of my client is that a particular type of settlement document related to a specific contract type has to reduce the business volume visible in WB2R_BUSVOL, as in the case of credit memos generated from VF01 TCODE.

Is there some settings in customizing in order to drive this behaviour in the settlement document?

Thanks for your answer
